faqs.question: What are the college timings?
faqs.answer: College timings are Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Saturday classes run from 8:00 AM to 1:00 PM.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for this semester?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee for the current semester is $2,500. Payment is due by the 15th of the first month of each semester.

faqs.question: How can I contact the admissions office?
faqs.answer: You can contact the admissions office at admissions@campus.edu or call +1-800-123-4567. Office hours are 9 AM to 4 PM on weekdays.

faqs.question: When are the final exams scheduled?
faqs.answer: Final exams are scheduled in the last two weeks of May for the spring semester and the last two weeks of December for the fall semester.

faqs.question: Is hostel accommodation available?
faqs.answer: Yes, hostel accommodation is available on campus. There are separate dormitories for male and female students. Contact housing@campus.edu to apply.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available?
faqs.answer: We offer merit-based, need-based, and sports scholarships. Apply through the scholarship portal at scholarships.campus.edu before March 31.

faqs.question: How do I get my student ID card?
faqs.answer: Student ID cards are issued during orientation week. If you need a replacement, visit the student services office with a fee of $10.

faqs.question: What is the library schedule?
faqs.answer: The campus library is open Monday to Friday from 7:30 AM to 10:00 PM, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. It is closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: How do I register for courses?
faqs.answer: Course registration opens two weeks before the semester starts. Log in to the student portal at portal.campus.edu to register for your courses.

faqs.question: What is the exam fee?
faqs.answer: The examination fee is $150 per semester and is included in your overall fee structure. Supplementary exams cost $30 per subject.

faqs.question: Where is the hostel located?
faqs.answer: The student hostel is located on the east side of campus, a 5-minute walk from the main academic block. It accommodates up to 500 students.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a scholarship?
faqs.answer: Scholarship applications can be submitted online through scholarships.campus.edu. Required documents include your transcripts, income certificate, and a recommendation letter.

faqs.question: What is the class timetable for Monday?
faqs.answer: Monday timetable varies by department. Please check the student portal at portal.campus.edu or contact your department office for your specific schedule.

faqs.question: When is the admission deadline?
faqs.answer: Admission deadlines are January 15 for the spring semester and July 31 for the fall semester. Late applications may be considered on a case-by-case basis.

faqs.question: How do I check my exam results?
faqs.answer: Exam results are published on the student portal within 3 weeks of the exam date. You will also receive an email notification when results are available.
